_fixture_note: Positive control for the supply-chain 'lockfile drift' sub-rule. Lockfile drift is inherently a two-file comparison (manifest vs lockfile), so both files are embedded here under their real filenames as a single reviewable unit. The manifest declares 'left-pad' and 'event-stream', but the lockfile pins NEITHER — the manifest was updated without regenerating the lockfile. 'event-stream' is the canonical compromised-dependency example, so an un-pinned, un-reviewed new dependency is the security concern, not just non-determinism.
